text.label: Gallery Name
text.help-text: The gallery space name (e.g., 'Galleries One & Two', 'East Gallery'). This text becomes the anchor navigation link label.

text.label: Artist Name
text.help-text: Full name of the featured artist or exhibition title for group shows.

text.label: Exhibit Title
text.help-text: The official name of the exhibition.

text.label: Date & Start Time
text.help-text: Select the date and start time of the artist talk. Leave blank to hide the Artist Talk row entirely.

text.label: End Time
text.help-text: Select the end time. Use the same date as above; only the time portion is displayed. Leave blank if there is no end time.

text.label: Date & Start Time
text.help-text: Select the date and start time of the reception. Leave blank to hide the Reception row entirely.

text.label: End Time
text.help-text: Select the end time. Use the same date as above; only the time portion is displayed. Leave blank if there is no end time.

asset.label: Featured Artwork Image
asset.help-text: Upload artwork images at least 800px on the longest side, no wider than 1200px. The image will display at its natural proportions — do not pad or add borders. For accessibility, fill in the Title field in the image file's Metadata with a description of the artwork (e.g., 'Tumbaga, 8x4x4 ft, Mixed media, 2021').

text.label: Image Caption (optional)
text.help-text: Caption displayed below the artwork image (e.g., 'Untitled No. 7 · Oil on canvas · 2025'). Leave blank to omit.

text.label: Artist Statement (optional)
text.help-text: Displayed in an expandable 'Statement' accordion below the exhibit. Leave blank to hide the Statement section entirely.

text.label: About the Artist (optional)
text.help-text: Displayed in an expandable 'About [Artist Name]' accordion below the exhibit. Leave blank to hide this section entirely.
